mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM score WHERE score >= #{minScore} AND score < #{maxScore}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM score WHERE score >= #{minScore}

SELECT c.class_name as className, AVG(sc.score) as avgScore FROM score sc JOIN student s ON sc.student_id = s.id JOIN "class" c ON s.class_id = c.id GROUP BY c.id, c.class_name ORDER BY avgScore DESC LIMIT 10
